productDisplayName: Mark Taylor Men Striped Grey Shirt
description: Composition Grey shirt with black stripes made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, a patch pocket on the left chest and a curved hem Fit Slim Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub, bleach or iron directly on print/embroidery Drip dry Warm iron This formal shirt from mark taylor is crafted for the urban office-goer with its fashionable design and flattering slim fit. Style it with formal trousers, a leather belt and leather shoes for a smart day-to-night combination. Model statistics The model wears a size 40 in shirts with height 6' and shoulders 18"
